subcodes.first_line: Truth hath appeared and from the horizon of might hath dawned. Say: Observe ye how it hath set the world in motion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق ظاهر و از افق اقتدار مشرق بگو ملاحظه نمائید که چگونه عالم را بحرکت آورده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im, @apocalyptic imagery
